name: realtime-operator
description: A local system-control voice agent built with the OpenAI Realtime API.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check smoke-test.mjs && node --check ui-smoke.spec.mjs && node --check ui-smoke-runner.mjs && node --check scripts/secret-scan.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke && npm run ui:smoke && npm run secret:scan
